infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Wooverse uses your location to show your position on the map and share it with your group even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Wooverse needs Always location access to track your position while the app is in the background.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Wooverse needs location to show your position on the map.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Wooverse uses background location to share your position with your group while the app is in the background.
